---
title: Immanuel Jonas Feld
image: avatar.jpg
about: 
  template: trestles
  image-shape: rounded
  image-width: 15em
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:immanuel.feld@warwick.ac.uk
    - icon: github
      href: https://github.com/immanuelfeld
    - icon: twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/immanuelfeld
---

### Bio

Welcome to my website! It is still under construction as you will notice while exploring other sections.

I am a PhD candidate in economics at [The University of Warwick](https://warwick.ac.uk/).
---
